description:
Debug-build invariant: after typer convergence, every Emitted outcome
in callsite_outcomes corresponds to:
  - a SpecKey in module_types.specs, AND
  - at least one EmitterSite in module_types.holders[target].

If either is missing, the Emitted is orphaned and the assertion fires.

## Acceptance

- Debug-build cargo test passes.
- Release build: assertion stripped.

## Removes

Nothing yet.
title: fz-CO.D.2 — Invariant: every Emitted has provenance
